programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Independent 80-year-old Frances has fallen into her empty swimming pool. Jerry, who's 20, is starting to question partying until 5am on a weeknight after ending up in A&E.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Michelle, 54, is airlifted to St George's after being involved in a car crash with her husband Paul. Derren, 41, has fractured his ankle while trampolining with his daughter.

programme.title: Discover Must Have Ideas: Shopping
programme.desc: Discover the very latest must-haves for your home and garden with Must Have Ideas.

programme.title: Discover Must Have Ideas: Shopping
programme.desc: Discover the very latest must-haves for your home and garden with Must Have Ideas.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Max McMurdo restore and upcycle 2CV headlamps, a child's rocking horse, a Victorian street lamp and a high chair.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien find, fix and flog unwanted possessions. At the fairground, the boys pick up a bicycle made for two, a ship's search lamp and a lambing chair.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Sisters Alison and Lynda hope that their eco credentials will impress their guests at The Miners Arms in Nenthead, Cumbria. But can Andrew and James face their fear of shared bathrooms.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Andrew and James aim to provide 'boutique on a budget' at the Rose and Crown, near Bolton. But they only have eight months of B&B experience, and their rivals are quick to pick faults..

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Nigel and Pok U host at their B&B and Cantonese restaurant, the Bingham Townhouse, in Nottinghamshire. But there are single-bed grumbles and problems at breakfast.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Kev and Tor host meditation and mindfulness breaks on their narrowboat, Spirited Away, near Rugby. But their guests aren't impressed by the communal living and diminutive facilities.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: There's tension, tears and tough talk as the B&Bers meet for the last time to find out how much they've been paid, before the winner is announced.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dog lover Kerry keeps her food simple and her welcome extravagant, with a Welsh choir awaiting her guests in her driveway. But a canine criticism leaves a bad taste.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Foodie Dave hopes to impress with home-grown herbs, hand-picked fruit and technical expertise, on a night featuring toilet inspections and rollercoaster revelations.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Shop owner Tasnim Sardar, who claims to be an amazing cook, plans an authentic Pakistani party. But Kerry has a bone to pick with her host.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Ryan puts a lot of thought into his dinner party, but each of his courses ends in disaster. Can dancing and drinks in the hot tub distract his guests.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the last night in Wales, financial advisor Gill Leonard welcomes her guests with a fire-breathing dragon, and makes a remarkable revelation..

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Alan Johnson and his sidekick Dave Owen host at Dunsandles Guest House in New Brighton on Merseyside. Things get off to a hairy start with some scandalous sheets.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Nick and Gina Mead welcome their rivals to the Lady Teal Hotel Boat on the waterways near Burnley, where the afternoon entertainment is a freezing competition out on the locks.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Brock hopes that his sense of humour and perfectionist nature will impress his guests at York House in Tetbury, Gloucestershire. But his reluctance to go off-menu at breakfast disappoints.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Hospitality veterans Leo and Sonya Brooke-Little host at Heyford House in Oxfordshire. One guest settles some scores during an afternoon of boxing.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&Bers meet for one last time to settle some scores and find out how much they've been paid. After accusations of over-enthusiastic hosting, the winner is announced.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: In Bristol, Phil helps Josh and Anna, who want a place of their own, while Kirstie has a tricky search with Sue and Samira, whose budget doesn't match of their requirements.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: In Rushden, Susan and John are torn over their unique character home. Kirstie has two renovation plans up her sleeve, but can Phil persuade them to list it.

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Ordering a factory-built house was a no-brainer for manufacturing maestro Pete. But, in true self-building style, even a near-finished project brings challenges like a bat out of hell.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Doctors suspect that 31-year-old Aaron has sustained a brain injury in a high-speed car crash. His twin brother Alvin talks about his hopes for Aaron's future.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Niki is airlifted to St George's after crashing in a charity bike ride. His wife is almost 300 miles away. Peter, who's 90 and served in the RAF in WWII, has blood poisoning.

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: The air ambulance teams help Dennis, who's having a heart attack. A spin on her bike has catastrophic consequences for Carolyn. And there's a dramatic car crash in Norfolk.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Doctors suspect that 31-year-old Aaron has sustained a brain injury in a high-speed car crash. His twin brother Alvin talks about his hopes for Aaron's future.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Niki is airlifted to St George's after crashing in a charity bike ride. His wife is almost 300 miles away. Peter, who's 90 and served in the RAF in WWII, has blood poisoning.

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: In Israel, Kate unearths icing sugar's secret ingredient. Jimmy grapples with a team of wrestlers who swear by a mysterious yoghurt called skyr. And Matt deep-dives for edible seaweed.

programme.title: Discover Must Have Ideas: Shopping
programme.desc: Discover the very latest must-haves for your home and garden with Must Have Ideas.

programme.title: Discover Must Have Ideas: Shopping
programme.desc: Discover the very latest must-haves for your home and garden with Must Have Ideas.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Gloucestershire, Simon O'Brien converts a gilded picture frame into a flat-screen TV surround, while Henry Cole turns a quick profit on a tractor.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien find, fix and flog unwanted possessions. Is there profit potential in an old crop sprayer, a cast-iron fire guard and old wooden workshop clamps.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: James and Kim Hodgson hope that their love of luxury will impress their guests at the White Lodge Hotel in Filey, North Yorkshire. But they receive some home truths in their feedback.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Amanda and her friend Alan at the theatrical Crystals on the Prom in Blackpool. The guests are surprised when Alan reveals his drag alter-ego, Ada.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Mark and Jean host at their plain and simple B&B, The Red Lion Country Inn in Upper Poppleton, North Yorkshire. But their guests find the rooms bland and the hosts get a grilling at dinner.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Kerry and Nicola hope to wow their rivals with their geodome tents and see-through pods at their glamping site, Camp Katur, in Kirklington. But some of their guests are not happy campers..

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It's the final day of the competition and the rival B&Bers meet for the last time to find out how much they've been paid, before the winner is announced.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Accident-prone trainee teacher Kirsty Davenport hosts with a simple menu and some creative entertainment. But have the group already tired of Russell's constant jokes.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The guests have high expectations for Ann-Marie Hamilton's menu. And she plans to reveal her fun side with a surprise singalong in the garden.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hairdresser Becci Moloney's outdoor bar is a hit with her female guests. But Russell and Adam don't know what to make of her collection of recycled toilets..

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Self-confessed foodie Adam has been talking his night up all week. But his guests are surprised by a menu that doesn't amount to much more than posh bangers and mash.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Funnyman Russell Turnbull hosts the final night. He's played his culinary cards close to his chest, but can he actually cook.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition starts at The Oak Tree Cottage in Burley, where Jacqui hopes that her homely approach will win the day. But her communal breakfast doesn't go down well with some guests.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to The Rising Sun Inn, in Bath, where owners Lorraine Hawkins and Norman Butcher impose a dress code for dinner. Some of their guests get flirty over breakfast.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Martin and Catherine Crosswaite pride themselves on their great Yorkshire hospitality at The Busfeild Arms in East Morton. But Martin's past shocks their guests.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to Patrick Duggan's Epstein House in Liverpool, where there's a competitive Beatles-themed game of charades and some shocking revelations.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It's the last day and Patrick has some questions for Jacqui and Jane, while Martin and Catherine have some explaining to do, before the payments are revealed and the winner is announced.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: In Devon, Kirstie searches for a home for single mum Michelle, who feels stuck after many failed offers, while Phil helps Ed and Catherine, who want a new life outside of London.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie revisits Julie and Allen, who decided to list their house and move to a home next to Allen's favourite pub. But did they follow through on their decision.

programme.title: The Orient Express: A Golden Era of Travel
programme.desc: The Express crosses the Balkans, tracing the blood-stained history of Sofia, Bulgaria and a palace of surprises, as Istanbul and our journey's end approaches.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Valerie, who's 63, has fallen off a horse. Natasha has damaged her leg while trampolining at her son's birthday party. Lisa may need emergency surgery on her prosthetic hip.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Motorcyclist Michelle, who's 49, is rushed to St George's after colliding with a car. Frankie, 19, has been thrown from her horse. And 11-year-old Merlin has hurt his wrist.

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: The air ambulance teams struggle to reach an injured horse-rider in a Norfolk forest. Steph is trapped with multiple injuries after a bad smash in Northumberland.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Valerie, who's 63, has fallen off a horse. Natasha has damaged her leg while trampolining at her son's birthday party. Lisa may need emergency surgery on her prosthetic hip.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Motorcyclist Michelle, who's 49, is rushed to St George's after colliding with a car. Frankie, 19, has been thrown from her horse. And 11-year-old Merlin has hurt his wrist.

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Kate Quilton heads to Spain in pursuit of the perfect tomato. What's the difference between risotto rice and long grain? And why aren't pork scratchings made from British pigs.
